$uid..validate:
newData.hasChildren(['name','nameSlug','score','timestamp','fp']) &&
            newData.child('name').isString() &&
            newData.child('nameSlug').isString() &&
            newData.child('score').isNumber() &&
            newData.child('score').val() >= 0 &&
            newData.child('score').val() <= 1000 &&
            newData.child('timestamp').val() <= now &&
            newData.child('fp').isString() &&
            (
              !root.child('nameIndex').child($quizId).child(newData.child('nameSlug').val()).exists() ||
              root.child('nameIndex').child($quizId).child(newData.child('nameSlug').val()).val() === $uid
            ) &&
            (
              !root.child('fingerprints').child($quizId).child(newData.child('fp').val()).exists() ||
              root.child('fingerprints').child($quizId).child(newData.child('fp').val()).val() === $uid
            )

newData.hasChildren(['name','nameSlug','fp','fpMachine','questionSet','currentQuestion','totalScore','timeLeft','questionDeadlineAt','selectedAnswer','showFeedback','isCorrect','status','createdAt','updatedAt','completedAt']) &&
            newData.child('name').isString() &&
            newData.child('name').val().length >= 2 &&
            newData.child('name').val().length <= 30 &&
            newData.child('nameSlug').isString() &&
            newData.child('fp').isString() &&
            newData.child('fpMachine').isString() &&
            newData.child('questionSet').isString() &&
            newData.child('questionSet').val().length > 0 &&
            newData.child('questionSet').val().length <= 40000 &&
            newData.child('currentQuestion').isNumber() &&
            newData.child('currentQuestion').val() >= 0 &&
            newData.child('currentQuestion').val() <= 100 &&
            newData.child('totalScore').isNumber() &&
            newData.child('totalScore').val() >= 0 &&
            newData.child('totalScore').val() <= 1000 &&
            (newData.child('timeLeft').val() == null || (newData.child('timeLeft').isNumber() && newData.child('timeLeft').val() >= 0 && newData.child('timeLeft').val() <= 1000)) &&
            (newData.child('questionDeadlineAt').val() == null || newData.child('questionDeadlineAt').isNumber()) &&
            (newData.child('selectedAnswer').val() == null || newData.child('selectedAnswer').isNumber()) &&
            newData.child('showFeedback').isBoolean() &&
            newData.child('isCorrect').isBoolean() &&
            newData.child('status').isString() &&
            (newData.child('status').val() === 'in_progress' || newData.child('status').val() === 'completed') &&
            newData.child('createdAt').isNumber() &&
            newData.child('createdAt').val() <= now &&
            newData.child('updatedAt').isNumber() &&
            newData.child('updatedAt').val() <= now &&
            (newData.child('completedAt').val() == null || (newData.child('completedAt').isNumber() && newData.child('completedAt').val() <= now)) &&
            (
              !root.child('attemptFingerprints').child($quizId).child(newData.child('fp').val()).exists() ||
              root.child('attemptFingerprints').child($quizId).child(newData.child('fp').val()).val() === $uid
            ) &&
            (
              !data.exists() ?
                newData.child('status').val() === 'in_progress'
              :
                data.child('status').val() !== 'completed' &&
                newData.child('name').val() === data.child('name').val() &&
                newData.child('nameSlug').val() === data.child('nameSlug').val() &&
                newData.child('fp').val() === data.child('fp').val() &&
                newData.child('fpMachine').val() === data.child('fpMachine').val() &&
                newData.child('questionSet').val() === data.child('questionSet').val() &&
                newData.child('createdAt').val() === data.child('createdAt').val() &&
                newData.child('currentQuestion').val() >= data.child('currentQuestion').val() &&
                newData.child('totalScore').val() >= data.child('totalScore').val() &&
                (
                  newData.child('status').val() === data.child('status').val() ||
                  (data.child('status').val() === 'in_progress' && newData.child('status').val() === 'completed')
                )
            )
